## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change made to solve it.

## Testing

- [ ] PHP syntax checked with `php -l`.
- [ ] JavaScript syntax checked with `node --check` when applicable.
- [ ] Plugin activates without PHP warnings.
- [ ] Existing calculators and shortcodes remain compatible.
- [ ] Creating and editing a calculator were tested when affected.
- [ ] Formula validation and AJAX calculation were tested when affected.
- [ ] Captcha, variable ordering, hidden fields and field widths were tested when affected.
- [ ] Frontend output was checked in the affected layout.
- [ ] English and Russian documentation were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No credentials, private URLs, customer data or production logs are included.

## Compatibility notes

List any WordPress, PHP, browser or data-migration implications.
